title: Traditional Turkish Kunefe
description: A sweet, crispy Turkish dessert made with shredded phyllo and cheese, topped with syrup.

ingredients.name: Kunefe cheese
ingredients.notes: available at Middle Eastern grocery stores

ingredients.name: Phyllo dough
ingredients.notes: shredded or cut into small pieces

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together kunefe cheese, sugar, and water until well combined.
Layer shredded phyllo dough in a 9-inch round baking dish.
Pour the cheese mixture over the phyllo dough.
Bake in the preheated oven for 30-40 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Sprinkle chopped pistachios over the top.
